Last Backups and Run History are now separate dashboard blocks you can hide and reorder independently.

## Changed

- **Last Backups and Run History are separate dashboard blocks.** They used to share one card, so you couldn't hide or resize one without the other. Each is now its own customizable block: hit **Customize** to hide **Last Backups** and let **Run History** take the full width for easier reading, or reorder them however you like. (#50)

Thanks to @ptmorris1 for the follow-up.
